plugins.name: konthai
plugins.description: konthai — reads deliberately obfuscated Thai (ภาษาวิบัติ) and gives you back standard Thai + English. Handles สก๊อย glyph-substitution, phonetic respelling, karaoke-romanized Thai, keyboard-layout collisions, the ภาษาลู cipher, RO-leet, gen-z slang, and คำผวน — on instinct, surfacing confidence and ambiguity honestly and flagging rather than faking when a span can't be cracked.
keywords: ภาษาวิบัติ
